title: Level 1 Librarian Books
description: Caps enchanted books from librarians to level 1
body:
# Important
**Requires [Villager Config Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/villagerconfig)**

# Description
This mod provides offers some balancing for librarians by limiting their enchanted books to only have level one enchantments. 

Primarily intended to compliment [Enchantree](https://modrinth.com/mod/enchanting-tree) when configured to require enchanted books.
